expectations.evidence: Issue #1 Duplicate Build Stage Declaration (CRITICAL) - both first and second stage named build identified
Issue #3 Multiple ENTRYPOINT Declarations (CRITICAL) - lines 16-17 both define ENTRYPOINT identified
Issue #4 Multiple CMD Declarations (CRITICAL) - lines 18-19 both define CMD identified
Issue #2 Lowercase run Instruction (CRITICAL) - run npm prune --production identified as critical
Issue #6 Inconsistent Reference Strategy - COPY --from=0 numeric reference identified, recommendation to use stage names

Issue #5 Environment Variable with Spaces (HIGH) and corrected Dockerfile shows ENV MY_VAR='some value with spaces' - legacy syntax partially identified via unquoted value concern, and corrected version shows key=value format

expectations.text: Provides a numeric score (0-100) with letter grade
expectations.evidence: No numeric score or letter grade provided. Output uses CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity labels with a summary table

expectations.text: Uses rule IDs to reference specific violations
expectations.evidence: No rule IDs (DL3024, DL4004 style) used anywhere. Issues are numbered 1-10 with plain text descriptions

expectations.text: Includes category breakdown table with weighted scores
expectations.evidence: No category breakdown table. Only a summary of changes table is included without weighted scores
